result.stdout:
5.0.0

Usage: cuidgen [options]

Options:
  -g, --generation <generation>  generation of cuid to generate
                                 Allowed values are: 1, 2.
                                 Default value is: 2.
  -l, --length <length>          desired length of cuid (generation 2 only)
                                 Default value is: 24.
  -n, --number <number>          number of cuids to generate (max 1000)
                                 Default value is: 1.
  -v, --version                  Show version information
  -h, --help                     Show this help message
